title: Authors and Citation
text: Mücke M (2026). gleif: GLEIF API Wrapper. R package version 0.0.1, https://m-muecke.github.io/gleif.
code: @Manual{,   title = {gleif: GLEIF API Wrapper},   author = {Maximilian Mücke},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.1},   url = {https://m-muecke.github.io/gleif}, }

title: GLEIF API Wrapper
text: gleif minimal R client gleif API. major challenge dealing financial data mapping entities across different data sources. Especially dealing legal entities, Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) can used uniquely identify entities.

title: GLEIF API Wrapper
text: can install development version gleif GitHub :

title: GLEIF API Wrapper
text: Currently download lei mapping data retrieval records LEI supported:
code: library(gleif)  # fetch the latest LEI mapping data (single file with all mappings) mapping <- lei_mapping("isin") head(mapping) #>                    lei         isin #> 1 00EHHQ2ZHDCFXJCPCL46 US92204Q1031 #> 2 00KLB2PFTM3060S2N216 US4138382027 #> 3 029200038B4L4ZI1E579 NGSDCBANCO00 #> 4 029200067A7K6CH0H586 NGSDCSCSPLC2 #> 5 0292001178F3RHI5D836 NGNEIMETH001 #> 6 0292001868F6N5VI5G15 NGGUARANTY06  # fetch LEI records by a given LEI identifier records <- lei_records("001GPB6A9XPE8XJICC14") str(records) #> 'data.frame':    37 obs. of  3 variables: #>  $ lei  : chr  "001GPB6A9XPE8XJICC14" "001GPB6A9XPE8XJICC14" "001GPB6A9XPE8XJ".. #>  $ name : chr  "entity_legal_name_name" "entity_legal_name_language" "entity_".. #>  $ value: chr  "Fidelity Advisor Leveraged Company Stock Fund" "en" "FIDELITY"..

title: GLEIF API Wrapper
text: gleifr - R package support analysis GLEIF data

what: Get or manage the gleif API cache — cache
title: Get or manage the gleif API cache — cache
text: gleif_cache_dir() returns path cached API responses stored. gleif_cache_clear() clears cached responses.

title: Get or manage the gleif API cache — cache
Get or manage the gleif API cache — cache
text: cache used enabled options(gleif.cache = TRUE). Cached responses stored 1 day default, can customized options(gleif.cache_max_age = seconds).

title: Get or manage the gleif API cache — cache
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # enable caching options(gleif.cache = TRUE)  # view cache location gleif_cache_dir()  # clear the cache gleif_cache_clear() } # }

title: gleif: GLEIF API Wrapper — gleif-package
text: Download data GLEIF API.

title: gleif: GLEIF API Wrapper — gleif-package
text: Maintainer: Maximilian Mücke muecke.maximilian@gmail.com (ORCID) Authors: Maximilian Mücke muecke.maximilian@gmail.com (ORCID)

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
text: Fetches direct child records given LEI.

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch children . simplify (logical(1)) output simplified? Default TRUE.

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
text: simplify = TRUE, long-format data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier name: attribute name value: attribute value simplify = FALSE, named list() containing raw API response.

what: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
text: Fetches ISINs associated given LEI.

title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch ISINs .

title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
text: data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier isin: ISIN

title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
Fetch LEI issuers — lei_issuers
text: Fetches list LEI issuers (Local Operating Units) GLEIF API.

title: Fetch LEI issuers — lei_issuers
text: data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier issuer name: issuer name marketing_name: marketing name website: issuer website accreditation_date: accreditation date

what: Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
title: Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
text: Download latest Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) mapping data Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF).

title: Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
text: https://www.gleif.org/en/lei-data/lei-mapping

title: Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
text: type (character(1)) type mapping data download. One "isin", "bic", "mic", "oc". Default "isin".

title: Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
text: data.frame() lei corresponding mapping.

title: Download the latest LEI mapping data — lei_mapping
Fetch LEI parent records — lei_parents
text: Fetches direct ultimate parent record given LEI.

title: Fetch LEI parent records — lei_parents
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch parent . type (character(1)) type parent fetch. One "direct" "ultimate". Default "direct". simplify (logical(1)) output simplified? Default TRUE.

title: Fetch LEI parent records — lei_parents
text: simplify = TRUE, long-format data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier name: attribute name value: attribute value simplify = FALSE, named list() containing raw API response.

title: Fetch LEI parent records — lei_parents
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # get direct parent lei_parents("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")  # get ultimate parent lei_parents("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336", type = "ultimate") } # }

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
text: Fetch LEI records

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
code: lei_records(   id = NULL,   legal_name = NULL,   jurisdiction = NULL,   status = NULL,   fulltext = NULL,   ...,   page_size = 200L,   page_number = NULL,   simplify = TRUE )

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
text: id (NULL | character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch. legal_name (NULL | character(1)) Filter legal name. relevant id NULL. jurisdiction (NULL | character(1)) Filter jurisdiction. relevant id NULL. status (NULL | character(1)) Filter entity status. relevant id NULL. fulltext (NULL | character(1)) Full-text search query. relevant id NULL. ... Additional filter parameters passed GLEIF API. appended query parameters, e.g. "filter[entity.legalAddress.country]" = "DE". page_size (NULL | integer(1)) number records per page. relevant id NULL. Default 200L. page_number (NULL | integer(1)) page number fetch. relevant id NULL. NULL (default), pages fetched automatically. simplify (logical(1)) output simplified? Default TRUE.

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
text: simplify = TRUE, long-format data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier name: attribute name value: attribute value simplify = FALSE, named list() containing raw API response.

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # get simplified long-format data.frame lei_records("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")  # get raw API response as named list lei_records("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336", simplify = FALSE)  # search by legal name lei_records(legal_name = "Deutsche Bank") } # }

title: Fetch LEI regions — lei_regions
text: Fetches list regions GLEIF API.

title: Fetch LEI regions — lei_regions
text: data.frame() columns: code: region code language: language region name name: region name
